programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.sub-title: ATL Homicide - Barney Simms
programme.desc: Quinn and Vince are called to assist after a well-known Atlanta civil servant is gunned down outside his home. Stakes are high as detectives piece together a timeline and chase down a mystery caller.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.sub-title: ATL Homicide - Heather Camp & Nicole Sartell
programme.desc: While working a homicide at an abandoned home, Quinn and Vince discover a second body hidden inside a closet. The investigation quickly leads them on the hunt for a suspect known as �Murder Man.�

programme.title: Payback
programme.sub-title: Payback - Vicious Vengeance
programme.desc: After an anti-violence activist is gunned down in broad daylight, investigators uncover a twisted case of vengeance and mistaken identity thanks to wiretaps, cellular forensics, surveillance video, and rumors on the streets.

programme.title: Sins of the City
programme.sub-title: Sins of the City - Cambridge, Massachusetts
programme.desc: The violent murder of 21-year-old Justin Cosby inside a Harvard dormitory basement sends shockwaves throughout the city of Cambridge and ignites a loving mother�s fight to clear her son�s name once the story goes public.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Without Warning
programme.desc: When a homeowner in a troubled Brooklyn neighborhood is gunned down at his front door, police suspect a robbery gone bad. But after the victim’s wife recognizes one of the men seen on security video entering the house, investigators uncover a ruthless murder plot driven by jealousy and greed.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Happily Never After
programme.desc: After a former cheerleader is found dead in the trunk of her car, police find surveillance video that shows a man running from the scene. Did her fairytale romance take a deadly turn? Was it the new man she met online, or someone unexpected?

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Tiffani Jacobs/Jackie Wortham
programme.desc: After falling mysteriously ill, Tiffani Jacobs looks to a man to help her feel normal but her quest for love drives her to do the unthinkable. In Spokane, Washington, Jackie Wortham scorches a path of destruction with a lover who fuels her fire.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Shakina Feazell/Tonie Marie Williams-Irby
programme.desc: Shakina Feazell struggles with addiction and finds love in rehab only to commit a crime that leaves Chicago reeling. In Lakewood, Tonie Marie Williams-Irby�s new love wants to steal more than her heart, she goes the extra mile to please him.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Erica Pugh/Yamiley Mathurin
programme.desc: Erica Pugh longs to break free from her parent�s rules and meets a man she thinks is her savior only to shepherd her down the wrong path. In Boston, Yamiley Mathurin�s dreams of success come to a halt when her lover derails her promising future.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Sheila McFarland/Renee Harris
programme.desc: As a single mom, Ohioan Sheila McFarland has always longed for a man to get her through the day to day. But when she meets local drug hustler Eddie �The Man� Brownlee, her already unstable world is about to be thrown even more off course. And in Georgia, a couple risks it all when a botched robbery leaves them high and dry.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Kiesha Pugh/Tonisha Harris
programme.desc: In Florida, Kiesha Pugh meets a man who becomes the sunshine she�s been dreaming of. But when money runs low, she winds up in a deadly scheme that goes up in flames. And in Dayton, Ohio, Tonisha Harris turns over a new leaf to provide for her family, until her man asks her to help clean up his dirty deeds.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - From Beyond the Grave
programme.desc: When a nursing student succumbs to a gunshot to the head, detectives� strongest suspects all have strong alibis. But when a recording of the victim is found, police will hear her name her own killer from beyond the grave, exposing one alibi as a lie.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Without a Trace
programme.desc: In 2008, a young woman vanishes from her Connecticut hometown after a family vacation. Detectives fear the worst after speaking with the person who last saw her, and a popular crime show may hold the only key to finding Ashley and her killer.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.sub-title: ATL Homicide - Harvey Rutherford
programme.desc: A mother�s plea leads Quinn and Vince to begin investigating a homicide while the victim is still alive. To close the case, they must navigate a long trail of lies and misdirects before finally learning the truth.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.sub-title: ATL Homicide - Obiakor Onyemaechi
programme.desc: A convenience store clerk is shot multiple times just before closing, but the twists and turns that lead to a break in the case aren�t nearly as crazy as what happens after the arrest.

programme.title: Payback
programme.sub-title: Payback - In Broad Daylight
programme.desc: After a deadly shooting is caught on camera, detectives need to employ multiple investigative methods to convict a suspect who took justice into his own hands, and sadly, killed the wrong man.

programme.title: Sins of the City
programme.sub-title: Sins of the City - Austin, Texas
programme.desc: Austin�s peaceful atmosphere is shattered when a wave of bombings appears to target the city�s minority communities. Multiple law enforcement agencies descend upon the city to try and put an end to the carnage before the body count rises.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - A Mother’s Intuition
programme.desc: When a young woman goes missing after a night out with friends, her family fears the worst. After days of searching, a glimmer of hope is restored when her mother receives a text from her missing daughter. But the truth is far more sinister than anyone could have imagined.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - When a Killer Goes Free
programme.desc: When a single mom disappears after celebrating Independence Day in Milwaukee, her family immediately knows something is wrong. The victim’s family soon finds out she was left at a bar alone that night and a security video from the bar puts detectives on the trail of a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Happily Never After
programme.desc: After a former cheerleader is found dead in the trunk of her car, police find surveillance video that shows a man running from the scene. Did her fairytale romance take a deadly turn? Was it the new man she met online, or someone unexpected?

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Tiffani Jacobs/Jackie Wortham
programme.desc: After falling mysteriously ill, Tiffani Jacobs looks to a man to help her feel normal but her quest for love drives her to do the unthinkable. In Spokane, Washington, Jackie Wortham scorches a path of destruction with a lover who fuels her fire.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Shakina Feazell/Tonie Marie Williams-Irby
programme.desc: Shakina Feazell struggles with addiction and finds love in rehab only to commit a crime that leaves Chicago reeling. In Lakewood, Tonie Marie Williams-Irby�s new love wants to steal more than her heart, she goes the extra mile to please him.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Erica Pugh/Yamiley Mathurin
programme.desc: Erica Pugh longs to break free from her parent�s rules and meets a man she thinks is her savior only to shepherd her down the wrong path. In Boston, Yamiley Mathurin�s dreams of success come to a halt when her lover derails her promising future.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Sheila McFarland/Renee Harris
programme.desc: As a single mom, Ohioan Sheila McFarland has always longed for a man to get her through the day to day. But when she meets local drug hustler Eddie �The Man� Brownlee, her already unstable world is about to be thrown even more off course. programme.sub-title: For My Man - Kiesha Pugh/Tonisha Harris
programme.desc: In Florida, Kiesha Pugh meets a man who becomes the sunshine she�s been dreaming of. But when money runs low, she winds up in a deadly scheme that goes up in flames. And in Dayton, Ohio, Tonisha Harris turns over a new leaf to provide for her family, until her man asks her to help clean up his dirty deeds.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - From Beyond the Grave
programme.desc: When a nursing student succumbs to a gunshot to the head, detectives� strongest suspects all have strong alibis. But when a recording of the victim is found, police will hear her name her own killer from beyond the grave, exposing one alibi as a lie.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Without a Trace
programme.desc: In 2008, a young woman vanishes from her Connecticut hometown after a family vacation. Detectives fear the worst after speaking with the person who last saw her, and a popular crime show may hold the only key to finding Ashley and her killer.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.sub-title: ATL Homicide - Harvey Rutherford
programme.desc: A mother�s plea leads Quinn and Vince to begin investigating a homicide while the victim is still alive. To close the case, they must navigate a long trail of lies and misdirects before finally learning the truth.
